user_messages.content:
参考这个github开源项目https://github.com/morettt/my-neuro，我已经将其下载下来就是当前所处的这个文件夹内。http://mynewbot.com/tutorials/local这个是该项目本地部署的指南网站，我目前已经做了这些操作(base) D:\deskmate\deskmate\my-neuro-main>conda create -n my-neuro python=3.11 -y
3 channel Terms of Service accepted

Channels:
 - defaults
Platform: win-64

Solving environment: done

Please update conda by running

    $ conda update -n base -c defaults conda

(my-neuro) D:\deskmate\deskmate\my-neuro-main>pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
